# 'gs ca --fill' without a message generator configured
# should error telling the user to configure one.

as 'Test <test@example.com>'
at '2024-03-30T14:59:32Z'

# setup
cd repo
git init
git commit --allow-empty -m 'Initial commit'
gs repo init

git checkout -b feature
gs branch track --base main

# create initial commit
git add foo.txt
gs cc -m 'original message'

# amend using --fill with no generator configured
! gs ca --fill
stderr 'spice.message.generator'

-- repo/foo.txt --
Contents of foo.
